بطاقة مديم 15%

فزعة الذهبية 10%

فزعة الفضية 10%

فزعة همم10 %

en.description:
Terms and conditions 

• To avail the offer a Fazaa member must present a valid Fazaa Card

• The offers are not valid in conjunction with any other deals or promotions. 

• The discount is non-transferable, non-refundable, and cannot be exchanged for cash.

• The Discount cannot be combined with any other promotional offers, discounts, or vouchers.
